loading_quotes.text: Fear is the mind-killer. Fear is the little-death that brings total obliteration.
loading_quotes.speaker: Paul Atreides

loading_quotes.text: He who controls the spice controls the universe.
loading_quotes.speaker: Pardot Kynes

loading_quotes.text: Walk without rhythm, and you won't attract the worm.
loading_quotes.speaker: Fremen Saying

loading_quotes.text: A beginning is the time for taking the most delicate care that the balances are correct.
loading_quotes.speaker: Princess Irulan

loading_quotes.text: Bless the Maker and His water. Bless the coming and going of Him. May His passage cleanse the world.
loading_quotes.speaker: Fremen Prayer

loading_quotes.text: I must not fear. Fear is the mind-killer.
loading_quotes.speaker: Bene Gesserit Litany

loading_quotes.text: Without change, something sleeps inside us, and seldom awakens.
loading_quotes.speaker: Paul Atreides

loading_quotes.text: The power to destroy a thing is the absolute control over it.
loading_quotes.speaker: Paul Atreides

factions_lore.description: House Atreides is known for honor, loyalty, and the wisdom of its leadership. They bring water-rich philosophy to the desert.
factions_lore.quote: Here I am, here I remain.

factions_lore.description: House Harkonnen rules through brutality, fear, and industrial might. Their cruelty is legendary across the Imperium.
factions_lore.quote: My desert. My Arrakis. My Dune.

factions_lore.description: The native people of Arrakis, the Fremen are fierce warriors who have adapted to the harshest environment in the universe.
factions_lore.quote: The desert is my home. The spice is my life.

mechanics_lore.name: Shai-Hulud
mechanics_lore.description: The Old Man of the Desert. Sandworms are attracted to rhythmic vibrations and can swallow a spice harvester whole.
mechanics_lore.quote: Bless the Maker and His water.
mechanics_lore.game_rule: Walk without rhythm to avoid attracting worms

mechanics_lore.name: Holtzman Shield
mechanics_lore.description: Personal defensive shield that stops fast projectiles but allows slow blades to penetrate.
mechanics_lore.quote: The slow blade penetrates the shield.

mechanics_lore.name: The Awakening
mechanics_lore.description: A toxic liquid produced by drowning a sandworm. Used in Fremen rituals to awaken prescience.
mechanics_lore.quote: The water of life. The poison that transforms.

units_lore.lore: The loyal soldiers of House Atreides, trained in Caladan's military academies. They fight with honor and discipline.
units_lore.quote: The Atreides troops are loyal to the death.

units_lore.lore: The death commandos of Muad'Dib. These elite warriors have sworn their lives to Paul Atreides.
units_lore.quote: Fedaykin - the death commandos of Muad'Dib.

units_lore.lore: Shai-Hulud, the Old Man of the Desert. Sandworms can grow up to 400 meters and live for thousands of years.
units_lore.quote: May His passage cleanse the world.

buildings_lore.lore: These massive structures collect moisture from the air, providing precious water for Fremen settlements.
Processing facilities where raw spice is refined into pure melange for transport off-world.
buildings_lore.quote: The refinery stands ready. The spice must flow.

buildings_lore.lore: Fremen underground communities carved into rock. A sietch is a place of refuge and family.
buildings_lore.quote: A sietch is a place of refuge. The tribe is family.
